error.heading: This shared track link is no longer supported
error.description: TrackDraw now uses published share links instead of the older URL-embedded share format. This older link can no longer be opened directly.
error.step1: Ask the sender to publish a fresh share link from Studio.
error.step2: If you still need an offline handoff, ask for a JSON export and open it in Studio with Import.
error.step3: New published links use the canonical `/share/[token]` route and remain the supported way to share read-only layouts.

expired.heading: This share link has expired
expired.description: Temporary TrackDraw share links expire after the duration chosen when they are created. Account-published project links stay live until the owner revokes them. Ask the sender to publish a fresh link if you still need this layout.
expired.step1: Ask the sender to publish the track again, or send an account-published link for longer-lived read-only access.
expired.step2: Ask for a JSON export if the layout needs a longer-lived handoff.

notFound.heading: This shared track could not be opened
notFound.description: The share link may have been revoked by the owner, or it may be outdated, incomplete, or miscopied. Ask the sender to confirm the link is still active or publish a fresh link. If the track is very large, a JSON export is a more reliable alternative to a share link.
notFound.step1: Ask the sender to confirm the share is still active and copy the latest share link again.
notFound.step2: Open the link directly from the message where it was sent.
notFound.step3: Ask for a JSON export if the track is very large — JSON files are not subject to URL size limits.

viewer.sharedByReadOnly: Shared by {author}. Read-only, no edits are saved. Switch to {view} or make your own editable copy in Studio.
viewer.readOnlyNoAuthor: Read-only, no edits are saved. Switch to {view} or make your own editable copy in Studio.

metadata.title: View Track
metadata.description: View this FPV race track designed with TrackDraw.
metadata.expiredDescription: This TrackDraw share link has expired. Ask the sender to publish a fresh link.
metadata.retiredDescription: This older TrackDraw share format is no longer supported. Ask the sender to publish a fresh link.

embedUnavailable.temporaryDescription: Embeds are available for published account shares. Open the share link or sign in to publish a durable embed.
embedUnavailable.expiredDescription: This temporary TrackDraw share is no longer active. Ask the owner to publish a durable account share.
embedUnavailable.revokedDescription: The owner has revoked this TrackDraw share, so the embedded track is no longer available.
embedUnavailable.missingDescription: This TrackDraw embed does not match an active published account share.
